_comment_MD033: <div class="grid"> is a Material-Markdown idiom for side-by-side layouts (docs/readme.md How-It-Works section); <details>/<summary> are used for collapsible install sections in READMEs. All other inline HTML stays disallowed.
_comment_disabled: MD013 (line length), MD024 (duplicate headings) and MD060 (deprecated) are not bugs in our prose.
_comment_MD050: MD050 (strong-style) disabled: QMD.md uses __-prefixed tokens everywhere (__init__, __Workspace, __Namespace, __id). markdownlint misparses these as underscore-strong, locking 'consistent' mode to underscore and flagging all legitimate **asterisk** strong as false positives.
